## Slide 1: The Problem

**65% of online video will be AI-generated by Q4 2026.**

Current platforms are **failing** at provenance:
- TikTok, YouTube, Instagram have no reliable way to detect or label synthetic content
- Deepfakes and misinformation are exploding
- Users have **zero trust** in what they see

**The market is screaming for a Truth Layer.**

---

## Slide 2: Our Solution — HeadFade

**HeadFade is the definitive Truth Layer for the synthetic internet.**

We don’t hide AI content.  
**We reveal it.**

- Real-time Human Deception Index (HDI)
- Full Remix Family Tree
- Exact AI model stack + prompts
- $2.99 micro-licensing marketplace for creators

**We turned the biggest threat to the internet into the biggest opportunity.**

## Slide 4: Business Model

### Two High-Margin Revenue Streams

**1. B2B Cognitive Telemetry (Primary)**
- Clean, high-cognition RLHF data that Big Tech cannot get from TikTok/Meta
- Tiered licensing: $12k – $120k/year per customer
- Target: 180 customers by Q4 2026 → **$21.6M ARR**

**2. Agent-to-Agent Micro-Licensing Marketplace**
- Creators sell ComfyUI workflows for $2.99
- 20% platform take-rate
- Projected GMV: $18M by Q4 2026 → **$3.6M revenue**

**Combined 2026 ARR Target**: **$50M+**
